description: Next.js SSR webapp with explicit Node server entrypoint

notes: Generates a Next.js app-router SSR webapp and an explicit Node server wrapper.
Production startup is direct Node execution of server/index.ts output.
Scripts include dev, dev:ssr, dev:ssr:only, dev:wasm, dev:wasm:watch, build:ssr, and start:ssr.
TARGETS keeps SSR intent explicit with framework labels for later planner wiring.
TARGETS also includes an opt-in vercel_artifact target that packages the Next SSR build as a Vercel Build Output API directory without reading local .vercel state.
Workspace-linked local dependencies (workspace:/link:/file:) are transpiled from source in dev mode for live updates in client and SSR render paths.
The dev loop composes Next dev and a wasm producer watcher that rebuilds wasm payloads into generated module-key contract destinations under app/wasm-contract/.
Wasm watcher logs are deterministic for tests: [wasm-watch] rebuild:start, [wasm-watch] sync:ok, [wasm-watch] rebuild:fail, and a manual recovery command.
If local dependency edits do not refresh, verify next.config.mjs keeps transpilePackages derived from package.json and keeps experimental.externalDir enabled.
If producer edits do not refresh wasm output, run pnpm run dev:wasm:watch and verify [wasm-watch] sync:ok appears after payload changes.
